title: Verify & Validate Employee Details (Employee Management)
acceptanceCriteria: HR Staff / Record Owner can perform "Verify & Validate Employee Details" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
businessRules: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation

workflow.name: Entity-Record Management
workflow.stateTransition: Entity-Record Management -> Employee Management -> Verify & Validate Employee Details

business.reason: Supports the Entity-Record Management business pattern for "Employee Management": Verify & Validate Employee Details is a mandatory lifecycle step - without it the module cannot transition to the next state.
businessRules: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation
validations: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation
business.stateTransition: Entity-Record Management -> Employee Management -> Verify & Validate Employee Details
business.acceptanceCriteria: HR Staff / Record Owner can perform "Verify & Validate Employee Details" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.
edgeCases: Verify & Validate Employee Details attempted with missing/invalid required fields
Verify & Validate Employee Details attempted by a role without permission
Verify & Validate Employee Details attempted on a record in an incompatible status

navigation: Detail drawer opens from list row click
Back to list from detail view

positiveTests: Verify & Validate Employee Details succeeds end-to-end with valid data and an authorized role; status/audit trail updates correctly.
negativeTests: Verify & Validate Employee Details is rejected when required fields are missing or invalid, with a clear error message.
validationTests: Each business validation listed for Employee Management is independently exercised against Verify & Validate Employee Details.
permissionTests: Verify & Validate Employee Details is rejected for any role not listed in this step's authorized roles.
workflowTests: Full lifecycle test: create -> Verify & Validate Employee Details -> downstream state is consistent with the Entity-Record Management pattern.
regressionTests: High - core lifecycle step, breaking this blocks the whole module
performanceTests: Verify & Validate Employee Details completes within accepted UX/API thresholds.
securityTests: Verify role-based access for HR Staff / Record Owner.
coverageRules: REQ-EMPLOYEE-02 must map to at least one test and one implementation file.

release.impact: High release impact; blocks release if incomplete.
release.rollbackStrategy: Disable or roll back Employee Management Verify & Validate Employee Details changes while preserving audit data.

automationTests: Positive: Verify & Validate Employee Details succeeds with valid data and authorized role
Negative: Verify & Validate Employee Details rejected with invalid data
Access: Verify & Validate Employee Details rejected for unauthorized role

evidence.status: Pending until coding agent writes evidence.
